description_long: This is an above-ground, octagonal jacuzzi with a wooden exterior paneling that gives it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The jacuzzi is filled with clear blue water, nearly reaching the top edge, and features a metal ladder at the front for easy entry and exit. On one side, there is a visible orange filtration or pump unit connected to the jacuzzi, indicating a functional water circulation system. The structure sits on a concrete or stone base, providing stability and separation from the ground. A wooden cover is propped up on one side, suggesting the jacuzzi can be covered when not in use. The overall design is practical for outdoor urban environments such as backyards, parks, or communal spaces.
description: An octagonal, above-ground wooden jacuzzi with a metal ladder, visible water filtration unit, and a propped-up wooden cover. The jacuzzi is nearly full of clear blue water and sits on a solid base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metal ladder and the main entry point into the jacuzzi.
description_view_1: Side view with the wooden cover propped up and the filtration unit visible on the right.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the orange filtration unit and the uninterrupted wooden paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the wooden cover and filtration unit both visible, showing more of the jacuzzi's side details.
attribute_water_level: nearly full, water close to the top edge
